# email-mcp
> Multi-service email platform for MCP-compatible clients. **Version 0.3.0-alpha** - FastMCP 2.14.3 Standards Compliance See [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) for version history. - **SMTP/IMAP**: Standard e...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Docs
- [Readme](README.md): Multi-service email platform for MCP-compatible clients.
- [Cursor Setup](CURSOR_SETUP.md): The minimail-mcp now supports **15+ email services** including:
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
- [Assessment](ASSESSMENT.md): **Category**: MCP Server + AI Orchestrator
